login.title: Sign in
login.mobileSubtitle: Player access for hunts, steps, and your account.
login.passkeyHint: Opens in the browser: your Lootopia site passkey (Face ID / fingerprint) signs you back in here automatically.

info.mfaRequired: Enter your authenticator code to continue
info.totpRequired: A TOTP code is required to complete sign-in.
info.passkeyRequired: A passkey is required for this account — use the passkey button below.
info.passkeyMfaRequired: This sign-in requires a passkey — use the button below.
info.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent.
info.passkeyAccountRequired: This sign-in requires a passkey — use the button below.

errors.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet.
errors.passkeyBrowserFailed: Could not open browser for passkey sign-in.
errors.passkeyBrowser: Could not open browser for passkey sign-in.

login.subtitle: Player access for hunts, steps, and your account.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Join Lootopia and start your adventure

success.title: Verify your email
success.description: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.
success.mobile: Account created. Verify your email to activate access.

toasts.checkEmail: Check your email to verify your account

verify.successDescription: Your account is ready. Sign in to continue.
verify.errorDescription: The link may be invalid or expired.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.mobileSubtitle: Enter your email: we'll send you a one-time reset link.

sent.title: 📬 Sent
sent.description: If an account exists for this address, a one-time reset link has just been sent
sent.default: Check your email for a reset link.

toasts.resetLinkSent: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email: we'll send you a one-time reset link.
forgotPassword.sentText: If an account exists for this address, a one-time reset link has just been sent

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong new password for your account.
resetPassword.mobileSubtitle: Paste the code from your email (or open the link on this phone), then choose a new password.
resetPassword.note: All existing sessions will be signed out.
resetPassword.subtitle: Paste the code from your email (or open the link on this phone), then choose a new password.
resetPassword.sessionsNote: All existing sessions will be signed out.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
errors.invalidToken: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset email.

mobile.title: Mobile app sign-in
mobile.description: Authenticate with your passkey to return to the Lootopia app.

invalidRedirect.hint: This page must be opened from the Lootopia mobile app.

mobile.orPasskey: or sign in with a passkey

errors.webFailed: Passkey sign-in failed on the web side.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your avatar and bio. Images are stored in object storage.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a profile photo. It will be saved to S3-compatible storage.

placeholders.bio: Tell other hunters a little about yourself

security.title: 🔐 Security
security.loginRequired: Sign in to manage your account security.
security.enrollInstructions: Add this secret to your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…) then enter the generated code:
security.disableInstructions: Enter a valid TOTP code to confirm deactivation:
security.passkeysEmpty: No passkey. Add one from the website (Settings → Security).
